query:
WITH waiting AS (
                    SELECT ck.key AS concurrency_key, cs.concurrent_limit,
                           COUNT(*) AS waiting_count, MIN(q.scheduled_for) AS oldest_job
                    FROM v2_job_queue q
                    LEFT JOIN concurrency_key ck ON ck.job_id = q.id
                    LEFT JOIN runnable_settings rs ON rs.hash = q.runnable_settings_handle
                    LEFT JOIN concurrency_settings cs ON cs.hash = rs.concurrency_settings
                    WHERE q.tag = $1
                      AND q.scheduled_for <= NOW() - $2::interval
                      AND q.running = false
                    GROUP BY ck.key, cs.concurrent_limit
                ),
                classified AS (
                    SELECT w.waiting_count, w.oldest_job,
                           w.concurrent_limit > 0 AND (
                               SELECT COUNT(*) FROM jsonb_object_keys(cc.job_uuids)
                           ) >= w.concurrent_limit AS gated
                    FROM waiting w
                    LEFT JOIN concurrency_counter cc ON cc.concurrency_id = w.concurrency_key
                )
                SELECT COALESCE(SUM(waiting_count) FILTER (WHERE gated IS NOT TRUE), 0)::bigint AS count,
                       COALESCE(SUM(waiting_count) FILTER (WHERE gated), 0)::bigint AS gated_count,
                       MIN(oldest_job) FILTER (WHERE gated IS NOT TRUE) AS oldest_job
                FROM classified
